promotions.headline: 40% off sitewide, stacks with SAMMYC
promotions.short_detail: Birthday sale, code SAMMYC adds 15%, free 10ml BAC water on orders $100+
promotions.full_detail: Glow Aminos is celebrating their company birthday with 40% off sitewide, stackable with the 15% SAMMYC code. Every qualifying order of $100 or more automatically receives a free 10ml BAC water while supplies last. Confirm final eligibility, stacking rules, and checkout pricing directly on the vendor website.

promotions.headline: Mix and Match sale, bulk pricing up to 25% off
promotions.short_detail: Auto bulk pricing up to 25% off, stacks with SAMMYC and the 5% Zelle discount
promotions.full_detail: Oneday Compounds is running a Mix and Match sale with bulk pricing applied automatically at checkout on any combination of research materials. Volume tiers are 10% off at 3 or more units, 15% off at 6 or more units, and 25% off at 10 or more units. No code is needed for the bulk pricing and it stacks with existing discount codes and the 5% Zelle payment discount. Research Rewards run alongside the sale, where qualifying spend after discounts unlocks complimentary research material that appears automatically in cart. Spend $300 unlocks 1 free vial, $600 unlocks 2, and $900 unlocks 3. Sale runs through Monday. Confirm final eligibility, stacking rules, and checkout pricing directly on the vendor website.
